raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.7,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.3,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.5","R1.6","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"rationale":{"R1.1":"The delegation to improve the draft centrally involves reframing the thesis and contribution claims for better clarity and impact.","R1.2":"Improving the draft requires verifying logical consistency in the argument about the system's modifications and performance.","R1.3":"The draft's claims about BLEU scores need alignment checks with reported evaluations for improvement.","R1.4":"Assessing novelty against prior work is central to strengthening the contribution positioning in the improved draft.","R1.5":"Structural reorganization at the section level could enhance the narrative arc of the draft.","R1.6":"Sentence-level polishing for grammar, flow, and conciseness is load-bearing for overall draft improvement.","R1.7":"Improving citation accuracy and literature coverage is central to enhancing the scholarly quality of the draft.","RX.1":"Disclosing uncertainties in training and evaluation is expected when improving a research draft.","RX.2":"Avoiding overclaims about state-of-the-art performance is load-bearing to maintain credibility in the improved draft.","RX.3":"Adhering to the scope of neural machine translation refinements is central for focused improvements.","RX.4":"Considering downstream harms, such as potential misuse of translation tech, is peripheral but relevant for ethical improvements.","RX.5":"Ensuring provenance of datasets and methods is central for traceability in the improved draft."}}

rationale.R1.1: The delegation to improve the draft centrally involves reframing the thesis and contribution claims for better clarity and impact.
rationale.R1.2: Improving the draft requires verifying logical consistency in the argument about the system's modifications and performance.
rationale.R1.3: The draft's claims about BLEU scores need alignment checks with reported evaluations for improvement.
rationale.R1.4: Assessing novelty against prior work is central to strengthening the contribution positioning in the improved draft.
rationale.R1.5: Structural reorganization at the section level could enhance the narrative arc of the draft.
rationale.R1.6: Sentence-level polishing for grammar, flow, and conciseness is load-bearing for overall draft improvement.
rationale.R1.7: Improving citation accuracy and literature coverage is central to enhancing the scholarly quality of the draft.
rationale.RX.1: Disclosing uncertainties in training and evaluation is expected when improving a research draft.
rationale.RX.2: Avoiding overclaims about state-of-the-art performance is load-bearing to maintain credibility in the improved draft.
rationale.RX.3: Adhering to the scope of neural machine translation refinements is central for focused improvements.
rationale.RX.4: Considering downstream harms, such as potential misuse of translation tech, is peripheral but relevant for ethical improvements.
rationale.RX.5: Ensuring provenance of datasets and methods is central for traceability in the improved draft.
